facts.place: Loving, Eddy, New Mexico, United States
facts.standard_place: Loving, Eddy, New Mexico, United States

facts.value:
Mrs. Elmer Yarbro, 53, resident of Loving for the past 25 years, died last night at a local hospital following a short illness.
Funeral will be held at 3 o'clock Wednesday afternoon at the First Methodist Church with interment in Carlsbad Cemetery, Rev. C. Frank York will be in charge of the service.
Mrs. Yarbro is survived by her husband and the following seven children: Mrs. Neil Warren of Bisbee, Ariz., Mrs. Hazel Davis of Barstow, Mrs. T.R. Conboy of Carlsbad, Edward, Hayden, Dorothy and Willie May Yarbro, all of Loving.
